g.text: Memory & Storage Mapping: Sparse File Hole Detection

ul.li: i_block[] entries or Extent Tree leaves marked with block_id = 0.
No physical block is allocated on the backing store.

ol.li: VFS Lookup: Translates file offset 4096 to block index 1.
Mapping check: bmap returns physical address 0.
Zero Synthesis: The kernel's read implementation detects the hole and performs a memset on the destination buffer instead of issuing a BIO (Block I/O) request.

ul.li: Storage: Actual disk footprint is 0 sectors for the hole region.
